fields.title: Continue If Leashed
fields.description: If the goal should continue to be used as long as the mob is leashed.

fields.title: Continue Sitting On Reload
fields.description: The mob will stay sitting on reload.

fields.title: Max Angle Of View Horizontal
fields.description: The rightmost angle a mob can look at on the horizontal plane with respect to its initial facing direction.

fields.title: Max Look Count
fields.description: The max amount of unique looks a mob will have while looking around.

fields.title: Max Look Time
fields.description: The max amount of time (in ticks) a mob will stay looking at a direction while looking around.

fields.title: Min Angle Of View Horizontal
fields.description: The leftmost angle a mob can look at on the horizontal plane with respect to its initial facing direction.

fields.title: Min Look Count
fields.description: The min amount of unique looks a mob will have while looking around.

fields.title: Min Look Time
fields.description: The min amount of time (in ticks) a mob will stay looking at a direction while looking around.

fields.title: Priority
fields.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

fields.title: Probability
fields.description: The probability of randomly looking around.

fields.title: Random Look Around Cooldown
fields.description: The cooldown in seconds before the goal can be used again.

description: Allows the mob to randomly sit and look around for a duration. Note: Must have a sitting animation set up to use this.
title: Entity Random Look Around And Sit Behavior
